title: Backend Developer Vacancy at BankBazaar Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at BankBazaar Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at BankBazaar Advisory Limited. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Backend Developer to strengthen our Faridabad-based team.

About BankBazaar Advisory Limited:
BankBazaar Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BankBazaar Advisory Limited!
